programme.title: BBC Comedy Short Films
programme.desc: Four very different schoolgirls are thrown together in detention. As they plan their escape, the situation spirals out of control.

programme.title: Doctor Who (2005–2022)
programme.desc: The Doctors embark on their greatest adventure in this 50th anniversary special. In 2013, something terrible is awakening in London's National Gallery; in 1562, a murderous plot is afoot in Elizabethan England; and somewhere in space an ancient battle reaches its devastating conclusion. All of reality is at stake as the Doctor's own dangerous past comes back to haunt him.

programme.title: Ghosts
programme.desc: Robin has an epiphany that has a far-reaching impact on the rest of the ghosts, who each struggle to believe his prediction. Alison suggests a spontaneous night out with Mike, just like the old days! They try to get the old gang together but with such short notice, only Obi and his new girlfriend, Brenda, are free. Despite Alison’s efforts to plan the best night ever, the evening doesn’t quite meet her expectations, and the couple are left pondering how much their lives are changing.

programme.title: Ghosts
programme.desc: Mike and Alison receive a life-changing offer beyond their wildest dreams. Still reeling from the news and anxious to discuss it, they are interrupted by a heartbroken Obi, who has been suddenly dumped by a strangely callous Brenda. Alison and Mike agree to reconvene with lists of pros and cons. At first, Obi’s romantic woes find a sympathetic ear in eternally lovelorn Thomas, but even he tires of Obi’s self-pity. Meanwhile, Alison must fend off the ghosts, who are desperate to sway her decision.

programme.title: Mrs Brown's Boys
programme.desc: Winnie’s ready to hit the road, but first she needs to pass her driving test. Naturally, Agnes and the gang volunteer to help her practise, and chaos soon follows. With Winnie behind the wheel, and Buster instructing, Finglas becomes a danger zone. Guest stars Shobu Kapoor and Marek Larwood add to the madness as things spiral out of control in true Brown family fashion.

programme.title: Mrs Brown's Boys
programme.desc: Cathy’s book group gets an unexpected new member – Agnes. After accidentally picking up one of Cathy’s novels, Agnes discovers she has a surprising fondness for steamy fiction. When she gatecrashes the next group meeting to share her, ahem, insights, Cathy is mortified.

programme.title: Two Pints of Lager and a Packet of Crisps
programme.desc: Sitcom about the lives and loves of five twenty-somethings. Jonny tries to make his son more exciting. Gaz becomes a new man for Donna by taking Flo's HRT tablets. Louise finds God.

programme.title: Two Pints of Lager and a Packet of Crisps
programme.desc: Jonny bids for a chance at his dream job. Gaz and Donna find their dream house. Louise dates her mobile phone and finally gets herself an amazing boyfriend.

programme.title: Two Pints of Lager and a Packet of Crisps
programme.desc: Jonny goes for his interview at the biscuit factory. Janet gets the chance to be a star. Gaz has to confront his greatest fear - sheep. And Louise struggles to keep Mick.

programme.title: Two Pints of Lager and a Packet of Crisps
programme.desc: Sitcom about the lives and loves of five twenty-somethings in Runcorn. Janet has a dilemma - does she leave her friends and baby for a life of luxury singing on a cruise? Donna becomes rich after her dead mother's money from the house comes through and has a very weird business venture idea.

programme.title: Two Pints of Lager and a Packet of Crisps
programme.desc: Sitcom about the lives and loves of five twenty-somethings in Runcorn. Janet gets a new job, but Donna's career is on the skids. Louise has a letter from her earth mother - but she can't open it. Jonny campaigns for baby changing facilities at the pub.

programme.title: Beyond Paradise
programme.desc: When the team attend a Dark Morris Dancing event, the ‘Legend of the Knuckerhole Dragon’, Margo finds herself at the centre of a crime when a member of her team collapses during their performance. With a severe allergic reaction to blame, and the victim’s epi-pen case empty, Humphrey is stumped as to how the attack was triggered unseen whilst all eyes were on the stage. As jealousy and secrets come to light, the targeting of the victim’s allergic reaction begins to paint a sinister picture. And with a connection to the crime, Margo is put to the test as she goes undercover to see what clues a familiar face might hold. Meanwhile, Humphrey and Martha take a big step on their homeowning journey, but Humphrey’s mind is preoccupied when a powerful figure from the Hub arrives at the station looking for answers. Elsewhere, Esther is floored when Zoe suddenly reveals her decision to travel the world.

programme.title: Pilgrimage
programme.desc: Seven well known personalities of differing faiths and beliefs set off on a unique 390km series of trails through the stunning landscapes of north east England to explore the lives of early Celtic Christian saints. They trek through the heart of Northumberland and the Scottish Borders along a curated network of trails celebrating three of England’s seventh-century northern saints – Hild, Oswald and Cuthbert. During the journey, they encounter Whitby’s famous cliff-top abbey and two of the most important pilgrimage sites in north east England – the Unesco site of Durham Cathedral and their final destination, the Holy Island of Lindisfarne.

programme.title: This is BBC Two
programme.desc: Highlights of programmes on BBC Two.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: Martel is struck by the fetching colour of a County Durham house. Dion is impressed by what’s on offer in Greater Manchester and Derbyshire.

programme.title: Escape to the Country
programme.desc: Alistair Appleton helps a couple who have never lived in an older home but who are now ready to fall for a bit of period charm in either Norfolk or Suffolk. With a £270,000 budget and three lively whippets to please, they are after a dog-friendly garden and a slice of East Anglian architectural history to call home. Alistair also meets a willow farmer and discovers how this wonderfully sustainable crop is being woven into the future.

programme.title: Gardeners' World
programme.desc: Spring is bursting into life as Frances Tophill returns to beautiful Damson Farm, where the garden is waking up in spectacular style. She shares important research from the RSPB on how to urgently support garden birds, reveals how to make the most of sowing older seeds, and gets hands-on preparing vibrant container displays ready for the sunny days ahead. At home, Toby Buckland is brimming with ingenious ideas to help you get the most from your outdoor space. Meanwhile, Joe Swift travels to the Cornish coast to meet a gardener who proves that even the wildest seaside weather can’t stop a true planting paradise. There's also a visit to a Cheshire gardener whose passion for Erythronium has created a display that’s genuinely out of this world, plus a viewer in Birmingham who has transformed their garden into a heartfelt celebration of daffodils.

programme.title: BBC News
programme.desc: Twenty-four hours a day, the latest national and international stories as they break.

programme.title: Politics Live
programme.desc: The big political issues of the day.

programme.title: Impossible
programme.desc: Game show in which 24 players compete across the series, scoring points by answering questions correctly. However, they must avoid the impossible answers, otherwise they will be eliminated from the show until the next day. In each episode there are three rounds, and the three highest scorers from each round play against each other in the final. The winner of this battle faces a £10,000 question.

programme.title: The Tournament
programme.desc: In the ultimate knockout quiz, eight players do battle on the Tournament Run in a series of exciting tug-of-war quiz matches as they attempt to knock their opponents out of the game and steal their cash. Only one player will be left standing at the end, but can they make it all the way to the Golden Run to double their money? Hosted by Alex Scott.

programme.title: Lightning
programme.desc: Comedian Zoe Lyons presents the electrifyingly fast quiz with a £3,000 jackpot. Six plucky contestants compete across six rounds testing their general knowledge, quick thinking and speedy reactions whilst our ruthless spotlight patrols the studio. The contestants’ motivation in each round is simple: stay out of the light and you’ll be alright!

programme.title: Clive Myrie’s Caribbean Adventure
programme.desc: It’s a family reunion for Clive. On the western tip of Jamaica, he meets up with cousins he hasn’t seen in decades. He doesn’t have time to relax, as he is in the kitchen preparing a classic island dish of curry goat for all the guests. He faces his fear and learns what it takes to harvest Jamaican honey, tries his hand at some unique pottery and makes an emotional return to the primary school his mum taught in before she emigrated to Britain in 1962.

programme.title: Ancient Invisible Cities
programme.desc: Michael Scott reveals the historical secrets of ancient Athens and tells the story of how this remarkable city created the world's first democracy 2,500 years ago.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Michael Aspel and his team of experts find themselves at the Victoria and Albert Museum, in this edition. Interesting finds include a collection of Japanese hair decorations, a necklace whose beads once adorned Egyptian mummies, some letters by Lewis Carroll and a silver-plated dish.

programme.title: Flog It!
programme.desc: Flog it! revisits some of the locations from the series, including Greenwich Royal Naval College, Althorp House and Herstmonceux Castle, with brand new valuations. Paul Martin is in Devon discovering how one man's lace business transformed a town.

programme.title: Richard Osman's House of Games
programme.desc: Every day this week, celebrity contestants Jacqui Joseph, Ben Thompson, Laura Tobin and Henning Wehn take on a series of quiz rounds selected by the host, quiz legend Richard Osman. A daily winner is declared following a quickfire round at the end of each show, and the scores are tallied across the week, resulting in an overall champion being crowned on Friday. Will the winning stars opt for the much-coveted House of Games decanter, or will they be tempted by the House of Games retro bag?

programme.title: Great Japanese Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Michael begins in the coastal city of Kanazawa, where he goes behind the scenes of the Shinkansen operation to join the cleaning detail who service the trains at breakneck speed. He then heads to a vast Shinkansen depot filled with iconic trains. At Kanazawa Castle, Michael discovers the history of the Maeda family, one of the most important and powerful samurai clans in Japanese history. Their love of the arts has left a lasting legacy of craftsmanship in the city. To finish the day, Michael travels to Kurobe to ride the exhilarating Kurobe Gorge railway, a narrow gauge mountain line which snakes along one of Japan’s steepest gorges.

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: The two highest-scoring chefs from south west England must go head-to-head and cook their six-course menus again. They need to impress a panel of exacting judges: Michelin-starred chef Tom Kerridge, former Great British Menu Champion of Champions Lorna McNee, and comedian and all-round food enthusiast Phil Wang. The guest judge is comedian and actor Ben Whitehead, who has recently taken over the infamous voice of Gromit’s sidekick, Wallace. How will he judge dishes celebrating the British film industry? Only one of the chefs will triumph and go through to represent south west England at the national finals.

programme.title: This Farming Life
programme.desc: King Charles visits Campbeltown Farmers' Market, where Andrew and Gayle hope to impress with their premium plants. Emma and Rob are holding a family wedding on the farm, but their pregnant cows could go into labour at any moment. And Callum and Zara hold a historic sheepdog trial, attracting competitors from afar - but Callum’s sheep don't go easy on him.

programme.title: Inside Barlinnie
programme.desc: Long-term addict Bobby heads to rehab, Billy fights for recognition that he has really changed, while Alan is released and heads back to his old ways on Glasgow's streets.

programme.title: The Apprentice: Unfinished Business
programme.desc: The Apprentice has a winner! Angela Scanlon hears from Lord Sugar and his newest business partner. As well as talking to the runner up, she is also joined by Baroness Brady and Tim Campbell.

programme.title: Newsnight
programme.desc: Insights and global interviews on the crucial news stories of the day. With Nick Watt.

programme.title: McCartney: The Hunt for the Lost Bass
programme.desc: The disappearance of McCartney’s original Höfner bass over 50 years ago is one of rock ‘n’ roll’s great mysteries. This is the story of the iconic instrument and the quest to find it. Featuring exclusive interviews with Paul McCartney, his brother Mike, Klaus Voormann, Elvis Costello and the roadies, journalists and fans who embarked on a mission to return the bass to its place in music history.

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: The three talented chefs from south west England are halfway through their heat, and the pressure is mounting. Once again, they each serve a unique take on the brief celebrating the British film industry and films with links to their region. The dishes are judged by veteran judge Simon Rogan. They include a guinea fowl dish designed to bring Aardman character Feathers McGraw to life, as well as a rum-soaked savarin, earl grey tea mousse and a milk ice cream paying homage to Sense and Sensibility. But who will be leaving the competition?

programme.title: The Other Bennet Sister
programme.desc: A group hike up Scafell Pike brings buried emotions and romantic confusion to the surface. During an unforeseen storm, Mary finds herself caught in the middle of rising tensions between Mr Hayward and Mr Ryder. As their expedition takes a turn for the worse, Mary is faced with real danger. The events of the day leave Mary feeling more conflicted than ever before.

programme.title: Michael Jackson: An American Tragedy
programme.desc: With unique access to friends and family, including Jackson’s sister La Toya, this episode charts Michael Jackson’s journey from child performer to a deeply troubled musical icon. Behind The Jackson 5, the family act that launched Michael to fame, was a household described by insiders as driven by fear as much as by talent. An offer of a film role helps Michael gain independence from his controlling father, causing tensions and resentments within the family. This leads to Michael's search for authentic connections elsewhere, including among the Jehovah's Witnesses. In 1982, Michael releases his masterpiece Thriller, catapulting him to megastardom and turning him into a global business empire. But the pressures of fame begin to weigh heavily, and colleagues also describe a pattern in Michael’s behaviour: a preference for the company of children.

programme.title: This is BBC Two
programme.desc: Highlights of programmes on BBC Two.

programme.title: Shift the Thrift
programme.desc: In High Wycombe, mother and daughter Liz and Alice battle to raise money for Great Ormond Street Hospital, gambling on vintage fashion, ceramics and a bold sewing machine buy.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: Dion has to navigate his way through an eight bedroom behemoth in Bangor. Jacqui takes in the views in Dover. And Tommy is in Lincolnshire to look around a bungalow.

programme.title: Just One Thing
programme.desc: Zoe Ball heads to south London to convince charity worker Latoya that gardening could be her secret wellbeing weapon. She is a total beginner, but the science is firmly on her side. Getting hands on with soil can build strength, bolster the immune system and reduce stress. If Latoya is willing to get her hands dirty, she could see her health blossom.

programme.title: Ronan Keating's Wild Atlantic
programme.desc: Ronan begins his Wild Atlantic journey in the county of Cork, Ireland’s southernmost and largest county. He meets up with his nephew Ruairí, and it doesn’t take long for the Keating competitive spirit to reveal itself. Together, they face off in the ancient sport of road bowling along the back roads of the port town of Castletown-Bearhaven. Ronan also gets the chance to go foraging for wild edible plants in an enormous rewilding project area, and on the stunning Beara Peninsula, he visits the country’s first Tibetan Buddhist temple and retreat centre.

programme.title: BBC News
programme.desc: Twenty-four hours a day, the latest national and international stories as they break.

programme.title: Impossible
programme.desc: Game show in which 24 players compete across the series, scoring points by answering questions correctly. However, they must avoid the impossible answers, otherwise they will be eliminated from the show until the next day. In each episode there are three rounds, and the three highest scorers from each round play against each other in the final. The winner of this battle faces a £10,000 question.

programme.title: The Tournament
programme.desc: In the ultimate knockout quiz, eight players do battle on the Tournament Run in a series of exciting tug-of-war quiz matches as they attempt to knock their opponents out of the game and steal their cash. Only one player will be left standing at the end, but can they make it all the way to the Golden Run to double their money? Hosted by Alex Scott.

programme.title: Lightning
programme.desc: Comedian Zoe Lyons presents the electrifyingly fast quiz with a £3,000 jackpot. Six plucky contestants compete across six rounds testing their general knowledge, quick thinking and speedy reactions whilst our ruthless spotlight patrols the studio. The contestants’ motivation in each round is simple: stay out of the light and you’ll be alright!

programme.title: Clive Myrie’s Caribbean Adventure
programme.desc: In Cuba’s capital, Clive realises his boyhood dream of taking on a potential Olympic champion at one of Havana’s legendary boxing gyms. He visits a car mechanic to get under the hood of a classic Chevy and finds out why most cars in Cuba are pre-1959 models. He also follows in the footsteps of the Buena Vista Social Club to discover how Cuban rhythms conquered the world.

programme.title: Ancient Invisible Cities
programme.desc: Using 3D scanning, Michael Scott reveals the invisible secrets of Istanbul's ancient palaces, aqueducts and Roman chariot-racing track.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Michael Aspel and a team of experts invite members of the public in Nottingham to bring along their antiques for examination. Discoveries of note include a pair of outsize boots, an important collection of memorabilia from the Nuremburg trials, and an Andy Pandy memento which is closely related to one of the experts. Plus a shirt worn by an Arsenal player in the 1950 Cup tie and a valuable ring found in a teapot spout.

programme.title: Flog It!
programme.desc: From the splendid interior of Gloucester Cathedral, presenter Paul Martin, along with experts Catherine Southon and Philip Serrell, views some exceptional items brought in for valuation. The items selected for auction range from a set of Victorian jelly moulds to an exquisite French snuff box. Paul also finds out more about the brief, but intense, friendship between poets Edward Thomas and Robert Frost whilst they were living in the Gloucestershire countryside just before World War I.

programme.title: Richard Osman's House of Games
programme.desc: Every day this week, celebrity contestants Jacqui Joseph, Ben Thompson, Laura Tobin and Henning Wehn take on a series of quiz rounds selected by the host, quiz legend Richard Osman. A daily winner is declared following a quickfire round at the end of each show, and the scores are tallied across the week, resulting in an overall champion being crowned on Friday. Will the winning stars opt for the much-coveted House of Games decanter, or will they be tempted by the House of Games retro bag?

programme.title: Great Japanese Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Michael ends the first leg of his Japan adventure on a Shinkansen bullet train, heading to Nagano, the host city of the 1998 Winter Olympics and the gateway to the Japanese Alps. At the top of the Ryuoo Ropeway, the largest cable car of its type, he takes in the spectacular view and the phenomenon of the ‘sea of clouds'. In the town of Obuse, Michael learns how Japan’s most famous artwork, Hokusai’s The Great Wave off Kanagawa, was made. He visits the largest wasabi farm in the world, where the plants are sheltered from the elements and fed by pure mountain spring water. Finally, he heads to the historic mountain town of Narai Juku, with its beautifully preserved wooden houses.

programme.title: Greatest Gardens with Diarmuid Gavin and Carol Klein
programme.desc: Garden experts Diarmuid and Carol are joined by guest judge and passionate gardener Patrick Grant to continue the search to find Northern Ireland’s greatest garden. The first garden they view is a coastal sanctuary, and owner Heather’s pride and joy in Millisle. Heading inland to Benvarden, Ballymoney, retired dairy farmer Shaun has created Brockagh Wood, a 15-acre woodland and wildlife garden in memory of his wife. Finally, they visit Iona Cottage in Greyabbey, home to Darren and Victoria, with its herbaceous borders and cut flower garden. Diarmuid, Carol and Patrick are searching for a garden which the owner has poured their heart and soul into creating. Which will they decide is worthy of a place in the Greatest Garden final?

programme.title: Beechgrove Garden
programme.desc: Calum Clunie kicks off his season at Beechgrove, demonstrating what can be grown from a container in just one season. He also starts a season of productive gardening, showing what can be produced for a family of four from a medium-sized vegetable garden. Meanwhile, as summer approaches, Brian is looking at how to keep lawns looking great and tackling a patio space around Beechgrove’s chiminea corner. There is a visit to a great new allotment in Perth, and there are all the usual handy hints.

programme.title: Gardeners' World
programme.desc: In a special programme, Monty gets an exclusive preview of a brand new garden created in Regent’s Park, London, to commemorate the life of Queen Elizabeth II, due to open on what would have been her 100th birthday. Over the last two years, a disused plant nursery has been transformed into a visionary garden, open to all. A vibrant, living tribute filled with wildlife, sustainable planting and a bold design for the future. Meanwhile, the team have been behind the scenes, watching the garden come to life from its very first foundations. Advolly Richmond uncovered the park’s extraordinary past, from its origins as a Tudor royal hunting ground to its reinvention as wartime allotments. And on a cold winter’s day, Adam Frost rolled up his sleeves to help volunteers plant 11,000 spring bulbs. Frances Tophill explored the magnolia, a tree much admired for its grace and resilience - qualities often associated with the late Queen. And Carol Klein gained access to a hidden gem of a nursery tasked with growing more than a quarter of a million plants for the Royal Parks, and uncovers the secrets of growing pelargoniums fit for a king.

programme.title: Spotlight
programme.desc: The scam starts with a small repair, then escalates into major work that will supposedly save your home – but it’s really funding a lavish life for the scammers. Their chief weapon is Irish charm: the travelling conmen have been crossing America, convincing homeowners to part with millions of dollars. With the FBI on their case, Conor Spackman follows the money trail and lifts the lid on where the cash goes.

programme.title: Live at the Apollo
programme.desc: Phil Wang introduces musical comedian Rachel Parris and the charismatic Brennan Reece.

programme.title: Newsnight
programme.desc: Insights and global interviews on the crucial news stories of the day. With Matt Chorley.

programme.title: The Wicker Man
programme.desc: A puritan police sergeant arrives on a Scottish island in search of a missing girl, who the Pagan locals claim never existed.

programme.title: Panorama
programme.desc: President Trump’s crackdown on immigration has led to a big drop in the number of migrants illegally crossing the border and a sharp rise in arrests in US cities. But his administration’s hardline approach has divided America. Two protesters have been shot dead on the streets of Minneapolis by federal agents, and an estimated 14 million undocumented immigrants are at risk of deportation. Reporter Darragh MacIntyre meets some of the families living under threat and asks whether the president’s tough policies are working.

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: The two highest-scoring chefs from south west England must go head-to-head and cook their six-course menus again. They need to impress a panel of exacting judges: Michelin-starred chef Tom Kerridge, former Great British Menu Champion of Champions Lorna McNee, and comedian and all-round food enthusiast Phil Wang. The guest judge is comedian and actor Ben Whitehead, who has recently taken over the infamous voice of Gromit’s sidekick, Wallace. How will he judge dishes celebrating the British film industry? Only one of the chefs will triumph and go through to represent south west England at the national finals.

programme.title: The Other Bennet Sister
programme.desc: After Mr Hayward’s sudden departure from the Lake District, Mary returns to London, where she receives an unexpected offer and faces renewed pressure from Mrs Bennet to find a match. After a run-in with an old friend, and with Mr Hayward absent from London, Mary wonders what happiness could look like for her. Can she find the courage to finally stand up to her mother and forge a path of her own?

programme.title: Global Eye
programme.desc: A weekly programme from the BBC World Service, bringing forensic journalism from all corners of the world by BBC Eye, the World Service's critically acclaimed investigative unit, and featuring expert global correspondents getting to the heart of the biggest international stories. This week, Farhat Javed looks at how Pakistan has positioned itself as a peace broker in the conflict between the US and Iran and BBC Eye investigates how routine visits for medical treatment in rural Pakistan have led to hundreds of children becoming infected with HIV, uncovering evidence of medical negligence and a failing public health system.

programme.title: This is BBC Two
programme.desc: Highlights of programmes on BBC Two.

programme.title: Piripenguins
programme.desc: When Pancake’s precious golden algae go missing, all the Piri friends fall under suspicion. Pancake turns detective and replays the evening - but the solution is far from obvious!

programme.title: Big Lizard
programme.desc: Big Lizard accidentally deletes some of Dad's 'boring' Proximan audio recordings. Through a dramatic sound adventure, Cosima realises the recordings are not boring - they're cosmic!

programme.title: The Weasy Family
programme.desc: The ducklings find a jigsaw puzzle and can't wait to put it together. But the attic is such a mess that there's no room left to play! Luckily, Spicy has spotted a sorting robot in the Farm of the Future.

programme.title: Super Happy Magic Forest
programme.desc: The heroes and the Council of Happiness swap jobs, and when the council fail in their quest, the whole forest is at risk of being flooded by Stinkystuff.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: Grizzy exchanges his indifferent fish with the Lemmings' affectionate and lively fish.

programme.title: Duck and Frog
programme.desc: Duck becomes a very serious librarian and makes it his mission to maintain the peace and quiet - that is until Frog arrives and has other ideas.

programme.title: Game on Grandparents
programme.desc: Top Minecraft and Mario Kart tips to help you turn your grandparent into a gaming legend. Plus Jelly, Yammy and Slogo face off in the ultimate Minecraft build showdown! Who will be crowned the Pro Gamer Champion?

programme.title: Bro's in Control
programme.desc: Jacob Lewis and Callum team up to challenge Joe, Adam and the Lewis Sisters to an epic driving test and fashion competition.

programme.title: Gladiators: Epic Pranks
programme.desc: Phantom, Fire, Hammer and Nitro dare each other to do silly things at a gym. To win, they must obey their fellow Gladiators’ outrageous instructions or tap out and risk losing!

programme.title: Newsround
programme.desc: Topical news magazine for children.

programme.title: Deadly 60
programme.desc: Steve Backshall goes searching for Patagonia’s perfect predator: the puma. After waiting his whole life to see one, Steve sees a tiny cub and witnesses a female puma hunting an armadillo.

programme.title: Gardeners' World
programme.desc: In a special programme, Monty gets an exclusive preview of a brand new garden created in Regent’s Park, London, to commemorate the life of Queen Elizabeth II, due to open on what would have been her 100th birthday. Over the last two years, a disused plant nursery has been transformed into a visionary garden, open to all. A vibrant, living tribute filled with wildlife, sustainable planting and a bold design for the future. Meanwhile, the team have been behind the scenes, watching the garden come to life from its very first foundations. Advolly Richmond uncovered the park’s extraordinary past, from its origins as a Tudor royal hunting ground to its reinvention as wartime allotments. And on a cold winter’s day, Adam Frost rolled up his sleeves to help volunteers plant 11,000 spring bulbs. Frances Tophill explored the magnolia, a tree much admired for its grace and resilience - qualities often associated with the late Queen. And Carol Klein gained access to a hidden gem of a nursery tasked with growing more than a quarter of a million plants for the Royal Parks, and uncovers the secrets of growing pelargoniums fit for a king.

programme.title: Snooker: World Championship
programme.desc: Coverage of day 1 of the World Snooker Championship at the Crucible Theatre, Sheffield.

programme.title: Women's Six Nations Rugby
programme.desc: Coverage from the second round of the 2026 Women's Six Nations as Scotland play England.

programme.title: Women's Six Nations Rugby
programme.desc: Coverage from the second round of the 2026 Women's Six Nations as Wales face France.

programme.title: Flog It!
programme.desc: Flog It! comes from Ragley Hall in Warwickshire, a beautiful 17th-century Palladian house owned by the Marquess of Hertford. Antiques experts Charlie Ross and Will Axon find great treasures among hundreds of visitors to the stately home. Charlie models an interesting Busby hat and Will gets a surprise when a Worcester coffee set goes under the hammer. Paul Martin explores the Battle of Edgehill.

programme.title: Elizabeth: The Unseen Queen
programme.desc: The story of Queen Elizabeth II in her own words, featuring never-before-seen home movies.

programme.title: Inside Britain's National Parks
programme.desc: Steeped in myth and untamed beauty, Dartmoor National Park's vast moorlands, characterised by open heathland, grassy hills and striking granite tors, provide a a sanctuary for rare plant and animal species as well as a treasure trove for archaeologists. Rivers meandering through the moors are home to salmon, otters and kingfishers, and peatlands host rare plants like the carnivorous sundew.

programme.title: Black British Music at the BBC
programme.desc: Trevor Nelson presents the first volume of a celebration of some of the very best in black British music from over the decades, featuring 40 tantalising tracks from the artists and genres that have been such a vital part of the national soundtrack. It's an epic, electric and eclectic playlist covering pop, soul, ska, reggae, drum and bass and much, much more - bringing together some of the most influential and inspiring names to ever grace the UK charts, including Soul II Soul, Hot Chocolate, Neneh Cherry, Sade, Winifred Atwell, Olivia Dean, So Solid Crew and Stormzy.

programme.title: Glastonbury
programme.desc: In June 2019, Stormzy delivered one of the all-time iconic headline performances on Glastonbury's Pyramid Stage, cementing his place as one of the most electric and powerful artists of his generation. With guest appearances, the famous Banksy stab vest and an audience following his every move.

programme.title: Snooker: World Championship
programme.desc: Extended highlights from the opening day’s action, introduced from the Crucible Theatre in Sheffield.

programme.title: Adalat
programme.desc: A farmer is aving 3 city boys from a tiger's theeth. In return they invite him to the city, where he find out that one of them rape his daughter.

programme.title: Mazdoor
programme.desc: A laborer-turned-businessman faces challenges after the marriage of his children.

programme.title: Dil Tera Aashiq
programme.desc: Thakur Ranvir Singh Chaudhary cuts off his ties with his sister after she marries a man below their status, but after her death the responsibility of looking after her children falls on him.

programme.title: Khud-Daar
programme.desc: Hari is forced to marry Seema, who dislikes his stepbrothers, Govind and Rajesh. When he goes to Mumbai, she displaces them to become beggars. However, destiny reunites them with Hari in a courtroom.

programme.title: Tum Haseen Main Jawaan
programme.desc: Sunil, a promiscuous navy officer, falls in love with Anuradha and introduces her to his family. However, an admirer of Anuradha tries to deceive Sunil by informing him that she is a single mother.

programme.title: Brahmachari
programme.desc: Abandoned as a child, Brahmachari lives in a mortgaged house with twelve young orphans. He saves a woman from dying and she changes his life forever. But first she has to deal with her own affairs.

programme.title: Ittefaq 1969
programme.desc: Dilip, who loves his passion more than his wife, threatens to kill her if she harms his paintings. Later, when his wife is found murdered, he is accused of the crime and sent to a psychiatric ward.

programme.title: Hamraaz
programme.desc: Kumar, a stage actor, falls in love with Meena and gets married to her. Things take a turn when one day she is found murdered and he becomes the prime suspect.

programme.title: Kudrat 1981
programme.desc: Chandramukhi visits Shimla and learns that she is a reincarnation of Paro, a girl who was raped and murdered. Plagued by her dark past, she attempts to bring the culprits to justice.

programme.title: Yaraana
programme.desc: JB, a borderline psychopath, is attracted to Lalita, a beautiful young woman. He forces her to marry him but she runs away on her wedding day by feigning unconsciousness.

programme.title: Dhool Ka Phool
programme.desc: After Mahesh abandons Meena and their baby, she is compelled to desert the child to fend for himself. However, he gets adopted by a kind Muslim man and grows up to soon cross paths with his past.

programme.title: Ustadon Ke Ustad
programme.desc: Vishwanath and Jaikishan are two thieves and good friends. When they try to lead an honest life for the sake of their women, Pukhraj turns them against each other and the two become sworn enemies.

programme.title: Tyagi
programme.desc: Village-based Shankar makes his living as a farmer, living with his dad, and two brothers. He borrows money to fund his brothers education in the city. But once in the city they meet with the underworld and begin to carry on illegal activities.

programme.title: Sagar Sangam
programme.desc: Upon growing to be a criminal, Gopi's conviction sends him to Devipur where he uncovers the truth about his traumatic childhood and sets off to seek revenge.

programme.title: Aakhri Kasam
programme.desc: Jagga, a labourer, loses both his wife and son after an attack by an evil zamindar. He abducts one of the zamindar's sons, raises him as a good person and pits him against his father to get revenge.

programme.title: Babu
programme.desc: Babu, a young man, falls in love with Kammo. When a thug rapes her, he murders him out of revenge, which leads to his arrest. After his release, he starts looking after Kammo and her child, Pinky. However, Pinky grows up to be a snob.

programme.title: Saagar
programme.desc: Raja, a fisherman is secretly in love with Mona. When wealthy Ravi comes to live with his grandmother, Kamladevi, he sees Mona and falls in love with her.

programme.title: Aadmi 1993
programme.desc: Vijay, a factory supervisor, is falsely accused and arrested for killing his family. Just when he is at his lowest point, an inspector offers to help him in return for capturing the son of a gangster.

programme.title: Aa Gale Lag Jaa 1994
programme.desc: Roshni, a wealthy heiress, wants to marry Suraj, a poor man, but her mother disapproves as his father is an ex-prisoner. Meanwhile, a series of murders take place and the suspicion falls on Suraj.

programme.title: Kal Ki Awaz
programme.desc: When a bank chairman's son is abducted and held for ransom, DSP Ali intervenes but cannot save the child. Later, his world is turned upside down when his daughter is kidnapped.

programme.title: Justice Chaudhury
programme.desc: Justice Chaudhury is forced to go against his principles when criminal Shanker Singh's brother Jai Singh harasses his speech-impaired daughter Lakshmi.

programme.title: Yakeen 1969
programme.desc: Rajesh, a scientist, works with the Indian Government on a confidential research project. He is forced to deal with miscreants who wish to steal his research.

programme.title: Kanoon 1960
programme.desc: A lawyer decides to defend a man who has been falsely accused of murder as he knows the real killer is his future father-in-law, who is also the judge presiding over the case.

programme.title: Aapas Ki Baat
programme.desc: Kajal and Anand are two lovers who are separated when Kajal's family refuses to accept their relationship. Years later, fate brings them face-to-face with each other.

programme.title: Baghban
programme.desc: An elderly couple wish their children to care for them in their old age. But their children see and treat them as a burden, and they must struggle to regain their worth and dignity to themselves and others.

programme.title: EMI: Liya Hai To Chukana Padega
programme.desc: Sattar Bhai runs a collection agency called Good Luck Recovery in Mumbai's Bhendi Bazar area. Famous for his notoriety, he uses unconventional methods to make four defaulters repay their debts.

programme.title: Mission Istaanbul
programme.desc: A news reporter must uncover the secret on the 13th floor of a News Station.

programme.title: Hameshaa
programme.desc: Two close friends, Yash and Raja, share a passion for cars and beautiful women. They both falls in love with the same women.

programme.title: Baghban
programme.desc: An elderly couple wish their children to care for them in their old age. But their children see and treat them as a burden, and they must struggle to regain their worth and dignity to themselves and others.

programme.title: EMI: Liya Hai To Chukana Padega
programme.desc: Sattar Bhai runs a collection agency called Good Luck Recovery in Mumbai's Bhendi Bazar area. Famous for his notoriety, he uses unconventional methods to make four defaulters repay their debts.

programme.title: Ghar Jamai
programme.desc: Dwarka, a millionaire, is impressed by Anil, a principled man, and wants him to marry Mona, his daughter. However, after their marriage, he compels him to move into his house.

programme.title: Ek Thi Daayan
programme.desc: Bobo, a famous magician, plans to marry his girlfriend Tamara. Tragedy strikes when he gets scary hallucinations about his dead sister. Left with no other option, he seeks a psychiatrist's help.

programme.title: Ragini MMS 2
programme.desc: A sleazy film director's decision to shoot his latest erotic horror movie in a notorious haunted house angers the vengeful spirit of its past inhabitant.

programme.title: Undertrial
programme.desc: Sagar Hussain, a factory worker, is falsely accused of and imprisoned for raping his own daughters. Later, when his lawyer digs deeper, the truth reveals itself to be much worse than imagined.

programme.title: Train to Pakistan
programme.desc: The people of Mano Majra, a village on the Indo-Pak border, live in harmony. However, things change when a train arrives from Pakistan containing the dead bodies of the people coming to India.

programme.title: Agnee Prem
programme.desc: When two childhood friends are separated from each other, they promise to meet each year at a temple on a hill. However, they meet 10 years later when they are grown-ups.

programme.title: Dil Hai Betaab
programme.desc: Meena and Raja, who are in love with each other, decide to marry.

programme.title: Mohabbat Ki Arzoo
programme.desc: A motor mechanic posing as a rich man falls in love with a girl from a wealthy family pretending to be poor. The lovers rebel against their family members and society to remain together.

programme.title: Kucch To Hai
programme.desc: A group of friends accidentally throw professor Bakshi off a cliff after seeing a corpse in his house. Years later, during a reunion, they are stalked by a mysterious killer.

programme.title: Dushman Duniya Ka
programme.desc: Mahesh, an honest man, is shocked to learn that his son, Lucky, has been using recreational drugs. Lucky promises to kick the habit but circumstances push him towards the world of drugs once again.

programme.title: Undertrial
programme.desc: Sagar Hussain, a factory worker, is falsely accused of and imprisoned for raping his own daughters. Later, when his lawyer digs deeper, the truth reveals itself to be much worse than imagined.

programme.title: Zameer: The Fire Within
programme.desc: Pooja gets married to Suraj but feels guilty for separating him from Supriya, his former fiancee. When Suraj learns the truth he abandons her, oblivious to the fact that she is pregnant.

programme.title: Mohabbat 1997
programme.desc: Gaurav and Rohit, two best friends, fall in love with Shweta. After a traumatic accident, Rohit dies and Shweta gets engaged to Gaurav, who seems to be hiding a deadly secret.

programme.title: Karobaar: The Business of Love
programme.desc: Friends Rajiv and Amar go their separate ways after Seema decides to be with Amar rather than Rajiv. Years later, prosecution lawyer Amar is delighted to see Rajiv in court and accused of murder.

programme.title: Bandit Queen
programme.desc: Phoolan Devi, who belongs to a lower caste, faces sexual abuse and discrimination in society. A turn of events leads to her becoming the revered leader of a gang.

programme.title: Nishchaiy
programme.desc: 2 brothers, Ravi and Rohan separated due to unforeseen circumstances created by Ravi's employer. Years later Ravi, who is released from prison and Rohan, a successful lawyer clash with each other unaware of the fact that they are real brothers.

programme.title: Shor in the City
programme.desc: Various residents and career-criminals face challenges in crime-laden Mumbai.

programme.title: Hindustan Ki Kasam

programme.title: Duck and Frog
programme.desc: Duck and Frog have one simple job: press buttons in a lift - and they can’t even do that right. Can they get the mayor to the ground floor in time for a grand opening?

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!
programme.desc: Starfire mistakenly thinks she has killed Beast Boy.

programme.title: Horrible Histories: The Movie
programme.desc: When Roman lad Atti offends edgy Emperor Nero, he is drafted to fight in far-flung Britain, where local Celt lass Orla itches to join Boudicca’s uprising against the occupying legions. Comedy from BBC Films.

programme.title: Duck and Frog
programme.desc: Duck has a job punting tourists along the waterways, but a bored Frog thinks he can do a better job. Thanks to Frog's interference, the pair wind up going on a wild trip down the rapids.

programme.desc: A medallion that Shaggy wears apparently causes an ancient myth to come to life.

programme.desc: A gang of kids steal the Krusty Krab's grill.

programme.desc: Gark befriends Jackson, a tatty-eared street cat looking to settle old scores.

programme.title: Stage Stars
programme.desc: With Halloween approaching, the Year 7s have been told about the school ghost and set off to hunt for it. Meanwhile, the Anything Goes cast try not to get too spooked by the thought of opening night for their show, and Encore - the most senior dancers at the school - warm up for their next big show.

programme.title: Jamie Johnson FC
programme.desc: Leah’s mum pressures her to treat Christina as a rival, testing their friendship and leading to a spicy football game. Hawx CEO Gordon tries to keep the club’s new sponsors happy.

programme.title: Operation Ouch!
programme.desc: The doctors investigate how fast farts travel with their Fart-O-Matic contraption. And Gladiator Dynamite tests Dr Dan and Dr Raph’s bulging biceps in an epic Body Battle!

programme.title: Octonauts: Above & Beyond
programme.desc: The Octonauts help pupfish in the Nevada Desert when their aquatic home is in trouble.

programme.title: Big Lizard
programme.desc: When a pack of pesky, migrating trilobites overrun the ship, Big Lizard has to use a hidden talent to lure them away. But one little trilobite, Rex, decides to stay.

programme.title: Piripenguins
programme.desc: The Piripenguins fall under the spell of a magical Merguin, a mermaid-penguin, who has the ability to change their personality. But all is not as it seems.

programme.title: Duck and Frog
programme.desc: When Duck gets a job as a baker, Frog realises he can get free treats! However, a mix-up with the dough causes a birthday cake to grow out of control!

programme.title: Super Happy Magic Forest
programme.desc: Herbert takes his failed cooling hat invention along on a quest, using it to save the day after being faced with the Riddlemaster’s jibes.

In this episode, chef Anna Olson teaches the contestants how to use a mirror glaze technique - in the elimination round, the home bakers create a decadent dessert inspired by a best-selling chocolate treat.

programme.title: Gordon Ramsay's Food Stars USA
programme.desc: The American version of the competitive cookery series where chef Gordon Ramsay brings his expert knowledge and unique leadership style to a search for the next great food and beverage industry entrepreneur. The teams go up against each other to create an enticing menu for a delivery-only restaurant that will serve office workers in downtown Los Angeles, but they must do so while cooking in a pared-down 'ghost kitchen'.

programme.title: Buying the View
programme.desc: House-hunting show that explores luxury listings in majestic mountain ranges, sprawling beaches, and glittering urban skylines. Estate agent Inderjeet Ranj helps Stephanie and Vince find a dream home inspired by their native Italy in the Niagara region - on the border between Canada and the USA - with a budget of one-and-a-half million dollars, but Stephanie and Vince have a hard time deciding which property will best suit their family.

programme.title: Georgia & Tommy: Baby Steps
programme.desc: Reality series following TOWIE couple Tommy Mallet and Georgia Kousoulou on their journey in parenthood and all the joy, tears, stress and magical moments that accompany it. In this episode, Georgia and Tommy return to Mallorca in the hope that a holiday will cement their relationship and they can move forward - as Brody celebrates Halloween, Tommy meets with a doctor to see if he has his diabetes in check, and Georgia has a change of heart about her wedding plans when she discusses news of another matrimony in the family.

programme.title: The Only Way is Essex
programme.desc: The Essex residents head to Brighton in search of fresh air, fun and frolics. But will a trip to the seaside smooth the emotional roller coaster that is Arg and Gemma's relationship? Meanwhile, Courtney considers getting back together with Myles, and Chloe questions Jon about why he's so different around women.

programme.desc: Have you ever wondered how clever you are? This is your chance to find out as comedy legend Lee Mack presents the ultimate leveller of a quiz show - it doesn't matter if you're not usually good at quizzes because the questions have nothing to do with remembering facts and are all about logic and common sense. This is the quiz that the whole family can play together - 100 contestants begin every show and try to make it to the end to answer a question that only one per cent of the country can get right and win up to 100,000 pounds.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: The American version of Gordon Ramsay's culinary boot camp. It's time for the annual blind taste test as the chefs discover just how well their instincts hold up without their eyes to save them - Chef Ramsay throws down the gauntlet as both teams try to stop overthinking and trust their guts and, ideally, each other. With tensions simmering hotter than their precious HexClad pans, pulling off a flawless dinner service might be the toughest challenge of all.

programme.title: Family Guy
programme.desc: Anarchic animated sitcom about a dysfunctional family in a wacky Rhode Island town. When Peter locates his missing iPad and reveals that he only now knows that the various panels on Hulu's interface are links to other shows besides Family Guy, he ends up watching some programmes that bear uncanny resemblances to the popular comedy-drama Only Murders in the Building, biographical crime drama The Dropout, and the multi-award-winning kitchen-based drama The Bear.

programme.title: Family Guy
programme.desc: Anarchic animated sitcom about a dysfunctional family in a wacky Rhode Island town. Arriving late at The Drunken Clam, Peter explains a sad story about Chris, who has recently having to break up with his first love in the form of a blind girl who mistook him for Colin Farrell, to the guys - this then prompts the others to recall their own first love experiences in ways that seem awfully similar to the plots of three classic films, namely Cast Away, Dirty Dancing, and When Harry Met Sally...

programme.title: Family Guy
programme.desc: Anarchic animated sitcom about a dysfunctional family in a wacky Rhode Island town. Peter then takes Cleveland to his job, only to end up being demoted when Cleveland is taken on there.

programme.title: Wheel of Fortune

programme.title: FYI Daily
programme.desc: Latest news from the world of entertainment.

programme.title: Liar Liar
programme.desc: Broad slapstick comedy. Fletcher Reade is the fastest, loudest, and brashest lawyer in town - he has a habit of lying to ensure his success and that includes lying to his divorced wife Audrey and even to his son Max. When Fletcher misses his son's birthday party after yet another lie, Max wishes that his dad could tell the truth for 24 hours - a magical force then makes the wish come true and Fletcher cannot stand the results. To make matters worse for him, Fletcher is working on a case that could send him to the big leagues of law - naturally, lying is the only way that he can make it a successful one. Unable to force the lies out of his mouth, Fletcher must come to terms with what Max has done and understand why he did so... and he must do so sooner rather than later as Audrey is planning to move away from Fletcher with Max and start a new life with her new love interest Jerry.

programme.title: FYI Daily
programme.desc: Latest news from the world of entertainment.

programme.title: Liar Liar
programme.desc: Broad slapstick comedy. Fletcher Reade is the fastest, loudest, and brashest lawyer in town - he has a habit of lying to ensure his success and that includes lying to his divorced wife Audrey and even to his son Max. When Fletcher misses his son's birthday party after yet another lie, Max wishes that his dad could tell the truth for 24 hours - a magical force then makes the wish come true and Fletcher cannot stand the results. To make matters worse for him, Fletcher is working on a case that could send him to the big leagues of law - naturally, lying is the only way that he can make it a successful one. Unable to force the lies out of his mouth, Fletcher must come to terms with what Max has done and understand why he did so... and he must do so sooner rather than later as Audrey is planning to move away from Fletcher with Max and start a new life with her new love interest Jerry.

programme.title: Minority Report
programme.desc: Intriguing crime action based loosely on noted author Philip K Dick's 1956 novella The Minority Report. In the year 2054, crime is virtually eliminated from Washington, D.C. thanks to an elite law-enforcing squad that uses gifted humans with special powers to see into the future and predict crimes beforehand - John Anderton heads the team and believes steadfastly in the system's flawlessness... that is, until the day the squad predicts that Anderton will commit a murder in the next 36 hours.

programme.title: Family Guy
programme.desc: Anarchic animated sitcom about a dysfunctional family in a wacky Rhode Island town. Quagmire lets slip to Peter, Joe and Cleveland that he is seeing someone, but he keeps her identity a secret - it is discovered after a failed stakeout that he is dating Elle Hitler, a fact that the guys don't understand, but she manages to win everyone over with her various quirks. Meanwhile, Brian takes advantage when Lois puts Stewie on a leash after he is almost run over by Dr Hartman in a parking lot.

programme.title: Family Guy
programme.desc: Anarchic animated sitcom about a dysfunctional family in a wacky Rhode Island town. Peter attempts to bond with Chris over a game of Donkey Kong, but when the latter offers to spice it up by re-enacting the game by building its levels over the front of the house, their escapade ends up breaking Lois's foot with a rolling water jug and forces Peter to raise his children without her for a week - his initial attempts yield mixed results, but he is soon noticed publicly and becomes a local star.

programme.title: Family Guy
programme.desc: Anarchic animated sitcom about a dysfunctional family in a wacky Rhode Island town. Stewie is introduced to hide-and-seek during a fundraiser at his daycare and becomes addicted to it, but when he attempts to play it with Brian once too often, he hides in Quagmire's suitcase and is accidentally taken to Paris in France. Meanwhile, Peter and Lois successfully bid on tickets to Vermont at the fundraiser and set out to break Bonnie's Instagram like record by taking a scenic photo.

programme.title: American Dad!
programme.desc: US animated comedy series about the escapades of Stan Smith, an extreme right-wing CIA agent dealing with family life and keeping America safe in the most absurd way possible. When Hayley and Jeff fail to fall pregnant, Roger informs them that Jeff is an alien with only a human brain and that they won't be able to conceive unless an alien gives birth to a fully-human Jeff.

programme.title: American Dad!
programme.desc: When the whole family forgets Father's Day, they promise to make it up to Stan the next day. But, using a memory neutraliser from the CIA, Stan makes his family repeat the day over and over until it's perfect.

programme.title: Lewis
programme.desc: When a university friend of Hobson is found staked through the heart on Halloween night, Lewis and Hathaway are approached during their investigation by a medium who claims that they are in grave danger - the following day sees a student murdered in the house that Hobson shared with her university friends while a clue at the crime scene leads Lewis and Hathaway to a third victim. As the body count rises, Lewis and Hathaway are forced to acknowledge that Hobson might know more about the deaths than she is letting on...

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Police drama series set in the 1960s. When a break-in occurs at the Children's Department of Ashfordly Council Offices, Nick disturbs the intruder but the burglar escapes with a file detailing an abortion - elsewhere, Kate helps a girl named Sandie when she cuts her hand while Nick hunts for a toddler that has gone missing in Whitby. Meanwhile, Greengrass is into pigeon racing and is horrified when peregrine falcons kill one of his pigeons - he is unfortunately told that it is not a police matter and sent on his way, but not before he is implicated in a crime...

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Police drama series set in Yorkshire in the 1960s. Gina undergoes a terrible ordeal when she is assaulted after a rugby match, but she is distressed by the attitude of the police and the local people when a PC is suspected of committing the crime.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Barnaby begins to question the guilt of a Midsomer Malham woman who is on trial for the murder of her best friend - the evidence is stacked against her, but she does not appear deluded or obsessed with the dead woman's husband as the prosecution claim. With the help of the key witness - a frail pensioner - can Barnaby and Jones discover what really happened on the night of the murder?

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Jonny and Paul argue about the situation between Katie, Gray and Perdy. Chas warns Gennie about turning into a layabout, and Sam offers to help Jo out on the farm for free.

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Brenda catches Gennie in the hot tub with Eli and accuses the Dingles of corrupting her daughter. Diane comforts Gray, and Paul begs Jonny not to give up on their relationship.

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Police drama series set in Yorkshire in the 1960s. When a man comes to Aidensfield unable to recall the last seven years of his life, it is suggested that he left his family and disappeared when he left the village back then - Kate contacts his wife Helen and she agrees to see him, but complications occur when another woman turns up claiming to be his wife. Meanwhile, Greengrass goes to see the film Strangers on a Train at the cinema and begins to receive pestering proposals from a man who took the plot of the film a little too seriously...

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Police drama series set in Yorkshire in the 1960s. A local woman's attempts to avoid her husband's advances by putting sleeping tablets in his whisky have tragic consequences, and Greengrass gets involved in illicit cockfighting.

programme.title: Vera
programme.desc: Crime drama series based on characters created by Ann Cleeves. DCI Vera Stanhope is called out to the grim scene of a body found in the back of a burned-out car - when identified as a popular local GP, Vera enters a world of intrigue, betrayal and lust, learning that the doctor's relationships with those that knew her were anything but healthy.

programme.title: McDonald & Dodds
programme.desc: Detective drama series. McDonald and Dodds have just tied up a case after a local scandal-breaking journalist dies of anaphylaxis at a party in her own home, but their work isn't over yet as a woman is separately found dead in a rented flat - the killer has removed all clues to her identity, but DNA reveals she's missing person Anne Holgate, who vanished on her way home from school over 35 years ago. The trail begins with her only living relative, her twin brother and wealthy financier Mark who is living the dream in one of Bath's most prestigious addresses - despite his grief, it becomes clear Mark may be concealing a dark secret of his own. McDonald and Dodds must unlock the deeply private Holgate and navigate through the tightly wound social circles of Bath's elites if they are to discover the truth - if they do, they may be able to put one of Bath's most wanted criminals behind bars, but McDonald's drive and Ormond's personal connection to the case may jeopardise the entire probe.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: A battle of the sexes which has raged in Broughton since the First World War comes to a head when ageing feminist Mildred Danvers is found dead after returning to her childhood home - as Barnaby investigates, misogynist vicar Reverend Gantis is shot through the head during a humiliating donkey race at the village fair. Is the killer on the side of the men or women, and do tragedies in Broughton's past hold the answer?

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Gennie mans the phones at the vets but her good intentions with an injured animal lead to her being arrested for theft. Sam comforts Jo when a sheep she has injured dies.

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Lisa worries about Sam's feelings for Jo and tries to warn him off. Lexi asks Jimmy to help her get back with Carl, and David searches Rodney's house for his manuscript.

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Norris decides to install CCTV after the break-in, and Jerry pays the price for his heroics as he gives chase to Kenzie and his gang when they pay a return visit to Roy.

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Police drama series set in Yorkshire in the 1960s. When a Russian ship docks in Whitby, Nick is confronted by a sailor demanding political asylum and claiming that he had to fight for his life to get into Britain - meanwhile, Greengrass teams up with an unusual partner in crime.

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Police drama series set in Yorkshire in the 1960s. The discovery of illegal wartime ammunition leads to problems when it falls into the hands of some local children, Greengrass wages a war against Lord Ashfordly's new gamekeeper, and tension is rising between Nick and Kate.

programme.title: Doc Martin
programme.desc: Comedy-drama series about a GP who relocates to the sleepy Cornish hamlet of Portwenn. Martin and Pauline are surprised by the number of patients coming to see the Doc on the last day before his surgery closes and he moves to London - after Edith comes to see Martin to discuss the events of the previous night, taxi driver Tommy delivers a patient to the surgery but complains of having migraines himself. Elsewhere, Bert has cooked up a new scheme to recycle used vegetable oil from his restaurant, Mrs Tishell makes a unique leaving gift for the Doc, and Louisa's teaching assistant Tasha causes concern for Martin as she appears to be a little dizzy - when Tasha then collapses at Portwenn's Harbour Day celebrations, the Doc is shocked to learn that she is married to Tommy and that he is driving Louisa to her hospital appointment. Fearing that Louisa's life in danger, Martin rushes after her but instead finds her safe at the scene of a road accident - she then goes into premature labour...

programme.title: Doc Martin
programme.desc: Comedy-drama series. Martin is struggling to come to terms with fatherhood as the baby boy born to him and his estranged partner Louisa is about to change their lives dramatically - the curmudgeonly GP with no bedside manner had planned to resume his high-flying career as a consultant in London and moved out of the surgery to make way for new GP Dr Di Dibbs, but the arrival of the baby means that the Doc has to adjust his plans as he moves into Louisa's house to help with the baby and what is an awkward situation for both of them. Meanwhile, Dr Dibbs is newly-qualified and excited at the prospect of moving into her first surgery with husband Gavin as the practice manager, but Martin begins to have serious doubts about the competency of the new GP after she misdiagnoses a patient, dishes out prescriptions for totally inappropriate drugs, and even misdiagnoses her own illness with almost fatal consequences - elsewhere, Martin is unprepared for a devastating personal blow involving Joan.

programme.title: McDonald & Dodds
programme.desc: Detective drama series. When Ian Andrews gets on at his usual stop, nothing is out of the ordinary - when the bus pulls into the station, Ian is dead. Despite it being the busiest route of the day, there isn't a single eyewitness to his death - McDonald and Dodds face a mammoth challenge as they try to unravel how a man can die in broad daylight, on a busy bus, and not a single person can see it happen. The only clue they have is a ticket stub for a local arts and culture festival found in Ian's jacket pocket - a few days prior, Ian had attended a talk from esteemed professor and 'bluesologist' Clarence Adderley, a man whose interest in the shady world of art auctions run by brother and sister duo the De Veres suggests there may be more to him than meets the eye. As the investigation begins to unravel, DS Dodds finds some answers may lead closer to home, but despite these revelations, McDonald and Dodds must stay the course to crack this most puzzling of cases.

programme.title: Lewis
programme.desc: Detective drama. programme.title: Lewis
programme.desc: When Andrew Crompton, an amateur astronomer and Master of Gresham College, is found dead at the foot of the stairs of a university observatory, Lewis and Hathaway find that the finger of suspicion points at all the staff from tutors right down to the head porter and the college scouts - as Lewis uncovers a college-wide blackmail plot and is confused by a mysterious astronomical conundrum, Hobson is unexpectedly drawn into the case while rehearsing for a performance with a local orchestra at the college.

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Marple
programme.desc: When a murder is announced in the personal columns of the Chipping Cleghorn Gazette, the locals wonder if it is just a game. The curious villagers then assemble at Lettie Blacklock's house to find that their host did not place the advert; the room goes dark and three gun shots ring out. Lettie is injured in the process, but the man who fired the gun ends up dead. Miss Marple pays a visit to her friend Amy Murgatroyd and sets about uncovering the dark secrets of Chipping Cleghorn.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Two contrasting weddings are taking place in Midsomer - Cully's to Simon, and local baronet Ned Fitzroy's to Beth Porteous. As Cully suffers from last-minute doubts, Barnaby becomes an unwelcome guest at Ned's marriage when the maid of honour is stabbed to death - what are the secrets of Midsomer high society, and will Barnaby get to his daughter's ceremony on time?

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: The residents of Milton Cross, a feudal estate with a church, farms, houses and acres of land, depend on lord of the manor Edward Milton for their livelihoods - when Sonia Woodley is stabbed in the churchyard two years after the death of her abusive husband Gerald, Barnaby and Jones investigate and the village starts to reveal its secrets.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: When a body is discovered in woodland near Midsomer Sonning, country magazine Midsomer Life and its outspoken owner Guy Sandys come under scrutiny from Barnaby and Jones - while former city fund manager Guy is disliked in the neighbourhood for his negative reviews of local businesses, the body proves to be that of a man that Guy's wife was having an affair with. Guy himself is then found stabbed through the heart...

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Witchcraft is the talk of Midsomer when tensions flare between former friends Aloysius Wilmington and Ernest Balliol - Ernest, who runs a store selling magical artefacts, is a firm believer in a cult called the Temple of Thoth, but Aloysius has upset him by writing a book claiming that the dark mythology was his own drunken creation. When tragedy strikes during a magic show staged by Aloysius, Barnaby and Jones must investigate the secretive world of Midsomer's Magic Circle to find a murderer.

programme.title: Grace
programme.desc: As Grace navigates the aftermath of Sandy’s suicide, his newfound son Bruno, and a profound personal loss in his and Cleo’s life, his team is called to a Sussex beach when an unidentified male body washes up dead in a barrel. The very same morning, Brighton football stadium receives a chilling anonymous demand and is faced with an impossible decision. Roy, who is at the match bonding with Bruno, now finds himself locked in a frantic race to save hundreds of lives, which comes at great personal risk. But the day’s terrifying events are only just beginning when an eerie CCTV discovery comes to light, leading Grace to believe that the family of a wealthy club shareholder is being targeted. The question is why. When forensics on the body from the beach indicate that the victim may in fact be linked to events at the stadium, in order to save an innocent life from imminent death, Grace must enter a cruel world of corruption, where normal rules don’t apply, and human lives have no value.

programme.title: A Touch of Frost
programme.desc: First in a two-part story ending the long-running series. When DI Frost joins forces with RSPCA inspector Christine Moorhead in a raid on a brutal dogfight, there are unexpected and deadly consequences - a boy is killed in a knife attack and the killer's father will go to any lengths to stop Christine, the only witness to the crime, from testifying against his son.

programme.title: Hamara Dil Aapke Paas Hai
programme.desc: Preeti courageously shares her story in court but faces backlash when the perpetrator strikes again. Now, she's not only battling her trauma but also dealing with her family's rejection.

programme.title: Haan Maine Bhi Pyaar Kiya
programme.desc: Pooja's world shatters after Shiv's betrayal. But when Raj, a movie star, enters her life, things change-and so does her idea of love, strength, and moving on.

programme.title: Chor Machaaye Shor
programme.desc: Shyam hides a diamond; released from prison, he impersonates Inspector Ram, gains favor, romances, faces scrutiny, while rival criminals hunt the gem.

programme.title: Mard
programme.desc: After a cruel betrayal, Azad, a king, is imprisoned by General Dyer. His son embarks on a quest to liberate him and restore peace to their kingdom.

programme.title: Indrajeet
programme.desc: Honest officer Inderjeet's life turns tragic, arrests love's father, faces transfer. Years later, avenges adopted daughter's murder, defying the law.

programme.title: Tirchhi Topiwale
programme.desc: Opposed lovers, Maya and Raj, find their paths when her parents' chosen suitor falls for someone else.

programme.title: Vanvaas
programme.desc: Deepak, aging and forgetful, seeks his vanished family after Shimla to Benaras. Conmen harm him, but reformers expose organ trafficking and his memory returns.

programme.title: Roop Ki Rani Choron Ka Raja
programme.desc: Orphaned after a criminal murders their parents, two children grow up facing hardships and eventually seek revenge against their parents' killer.

programme.title: Maharaja
programme.desc: Kohinoor is back to reclaim his kingdom, but things get messy when Ranbir kidnaps his nanny. Can Kohinoor rescue her and secure his throne? Adventure awaits!

programme.title: Parivaar
programme.desc: A young homeless girl discovers solace and a sense of belonging when she unexpectedly teams up with a street performer, embarking on a journey filled with friendship and hope.

programme.title: Laadla
programme.desc: Sheetal marries Raju, a union leader, to gain power and assert her independence. In a world of struggles, their union challenges norms and sparks unexpected change in their community.

programme.title: Krishna
programme.desc: Krishna, wrongfully imprisoned for seven years, is released and aided by a minister on a covert mission. His quest for justice is intertwined with action, suspense, and his battle against injustice.

programme.title: Ghatak
programme.desc: When Kashi opposes the torturous regime of Katya, he ends up compromising the safety of his family and relatives.

programme.title: Ghayal
programme.desc: Ajay is wrongfully imprisoned for his brother's murder, framed by Balwant Rai. Inside prison, he allies with three convicts and plans a revenge mission against Balwant Rai.

programme.title: Sanam
programme.desc: Gaurav, unloved by his family, joins the army after Narendra's death. He hopes to honor his brother's memory and finally win the respect of his distant father.

programme.title: Divya Shakti
programme.desc: A corrupt cop, a newspaper editor who glosses over mob activities, and a young reporter striving to tell the truth all combine in this explosive tale.

programme.title: King Uncle
programme.desc: Industrialist Ashok Bansal's harsh ways push away his siblings. But when orphan girl Munna enters their lives, she slowly softens his tough heart and changes the family.

programme.title: Sandwich
programme.desc: Shekar's feelings for Nisha hit a snag when his sister's wedding depends on him marrying someone else. Love and family ties clash, making for a messy romantic dilemma!

programme.title: Teri Meherbaniyan
programme.desc: Ram, a kind-hearted guy, arrives in a village ruled by the wicked Thakur Vijay Singh, setting the stage for a clash between good and evil as he seeks justice.

programme.title: Phool Aur Kaante
programme.desc: Nageshwar hands over his empire to his son Ajay, but Nageshwar's unhappy associates kidnap his grandson Gopal.

programme.title: Karan Arjun
programme.desc: Durga's two sons, Karan and Arjun, set out to avenge their father's death, only to get themselves killed by their evil uncle. Years later, the two are reincarnated to bring justice.

programme.title: Insaaf: The Final Justice
programme.desc: The witness's murder prompts a trap using a girlfriend posing as a victim, leading to success and a shocking discovery.

programme.title: Vanvaas
programme.desc: Deepak, aging and forgetful, seeks his vanished family after Shimla to Benaras. Conmen harm him, but reformers expose organ trafficking and his memory returns.

programme.title: Moksha Salvation
programme.desc: Vikram and Ritika plan to rob a bank to fund their business of providing free legal services to impoverished people. However, things get complicated when she is found dead.

programme.title: Baazi
programme.desc: An upright officer is wrongly accused of murder while probing a sensitive case. Escaping prison, he disguises himself as a woman to expose the truth and bring justice.

programme.title: Vanvaas
programme.desc: Starring: Nana Patekar,Utkarsh Sharma. Left behind by his sons, a dementia-stricken father begins a journey with an unlikely companion-a clever thief determined to help him reunite with his long-forgotten family.

programme.title: Holiday: A Soldier Is Never Off Duty
programme.desc: Starring: Akshay Kumar,Sonakshi Sinha. Virat uncovers a terrorist plan to bomb Mumbai. He leads his team into action, risking everything to prevent catastrophe and defend the city.

programme.title: Dabangg
programme.desc: Starring: Salman Khan,Sonakshi Sinha. Chulbul Pandey faces off against Baccha Singh, a local goon and aspiring politician. The conflict escalates when Chulbul kills Baccha Singh's younger brother, intensifying their personal vendetta.

programme.title: Ravanasura
programme.desc: Starring: Ravi Teja,Jayaram. Ravindra agrees to defend a murder case, but when more deaths follow, his awkward charm gives way to something far more sinister-and surprising.

programme.title: Surya The Soldier
programme.desc: Starring: Allu Arjun,Arjun Sarja. Surya's temper costs him his dream army post. Now, only a psychologist's approval stands between him and redemption. Can discipline and healing lead him back to the battlefield?

programme.title: Kanguva
programme.desc: Starring: Suriya,Bobby Deol. Bounty hunter Francis learns he's the reincarnation of warrior Kanguva. As memories awaken, he must face revenge, redemption, and protect someone precious from his old enemies.

programme.title: Raakshasi
programme.desc: Starring: Gitanjali,Shamna Kasim. To save a dying woman a man starts experiencing paranormal activities. Realizing that the spirit of the dead woman has returned, he sets out to unravel the mystery to give her closure.

programme.title: Daringbaaz
programme.desc: Starring: Pawan Kalyan,Samantha. A billionaire's grandson, Gautham Nanda, desperately wants to reunite his mother & his grandfather.

programme.title: Coolie No. 1 (2020)
programme.desc: Starring: Varun Dhawan,Paresh Rawal. When a matchmaker is insulted by Rozario, a rich businessman, he vows to exact revenge. As a result, he makes a porter pretend to be a rich man and marries him off to Rozario's daughter.

programme.title: Extra Ordinary Man
programme.desc: Starring: Nithiin,Sreeleela. Abhinay, once lost in artistic struggle, discovers love that redefines his path. A sudden opportunity to act in a movie changes everything, pushing him toward fame and self-discovery.

programme.title: Gadar 2
programme.desc: Starring: Sunny Deol,Ameesha Patel. When Tara Singh goes missing during a skirmish and is believed to be captured in Pakistan, his son Jeete sets out to rescue him and enters a labyrinth from which they both must escape at all costs.

programme.title: Marakastra
programme.desc: Marakastra

programme.title: Chatrapati
programme.desc: Starring: Bellamkonda Sai Sreenivas,Nushrat Bharucha. Separated by violence, a refugee searches for his foster family. But his toughest challenge isn't war-it's the betrayal by someone he once called brother.

programme.title: Raid 2
programme.desc: Starring: Ajay Devgn,Riteish Deshmukh. In Bhoj, Amay Patnaik uncovers a corrupt empire led by Dada Bhai. His pursuit of justice challenges the grip of power and the silence it demands.

programme.title: 90 ML
programme.desc: Starring: Neha Solanki,Ravi Kishan. A close group of friends gather over drinks, but casual moments soon expose hidden emotions, strained relationships, &personal conflicts, forcing them to confront responsibility & friendship

programme.desc: Starring: Hrithik Roshan,Priyanka Chopra. A young man with extraordinary powers, Krrish, pursues love in Singapore with Priya. Upon uncovering his father's fate, he must embrace his abilities.

programme.title: Hum Aapke Hain Koun
programme.desc: Starring: Madhuri Dixit,Salman Khan. Prem madly loves Nisha, his brother Rajesh's sister-in-law. But when Rajesh's wife dies, the families urge him to marry Nisha for the sake of his baby. Prem and Nisha decide to sacrifice their love.

programme.title: Raksha Bandhan
programme.desc: Starring: Akshay Kumar,Bhumi Pednekar. Lala Kedarnath flips chaat and dreams. Four sisters to marry, one Sapna to forget. Love waits while duty calls-because some hearts choose responsibility over romance.

programme.title: Karthikeya 2
programme.desc: Starring: Nikhil Siddhartha,Anupama Parameswaran. Doctor Karthikeya is framed and hunted. To clear his name, he must dive into ancient mysteries and retrieve a powerful mythological treasure.

programme.title: Sooryavanshi
programme.desc: Starring: Akshay Kumar,Katrina Kaif. Mumbai braces for disaster. ATS chief Sooryavanshi races against time to find 600 kg of missing explosives and the ruthless plotters behind it.

programme.title: Commando 3
programme.desc: Starring: Vidyut Jammwal,Adah Sharma. Officers Karan and Bhavana embark on a high-stakes mission to London, racing against time to stop a terrorist plot threatening their homeland, India.
